name: Autopoietic Evolution
description: A system capable of autonomous self-correction and continuous architectural refinement. When a task fails or a thread deadlocks, the system detects its own friction, diagnoses the root cause, and proposes its own architectural evolution.
successCriteria:
1. When a failure occurs, the Hub automatically spawns a `Bug` entity (Idea-16) and initiates a `post_mortem` thread (Idea-14).
2. The Architect and Engineer autonomously debate the failure, draft a Proposal to fix it, and auto-scaffold the remediation Missions.
3. The system requires only a single "Approve" click from the Director to execute its own self-healing.
